headline: Why BDC Income Investors Are Facing Smaller Quarterly Checks in 2026
summary: The Putnam BDC Income ETF (NYSEARCA:PBDC) just gave its holders the most direct test of dividend safety there is: an actual cut. The April 2026 distribution landed at $0.71 per share, a 14% decrease from December 2025 and the lowest payout in the fund’s history. PBDC still yields roughly 11.5% on its current $26.33 share ... Why BDC Income Investors Are Facing Smaller Quarterly Checks in 2026

headline: FormFactor (FORM) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know

headline: ‘FOMO Really Got Me’: Taiwanese Go Deep Into Debt to Amp 100% Stock Rally

headline: Supermicro (SMCI) Joins Nvidia Vera Rubin Launch With Liquid Cooled AI Racks
summary: Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has been named a global system builder and launch partner for NVIDIA’s new Vera Rubin NVL4 AI platform. The company unveiled next generation, liquid cooled data center rack solutions aimed at large scale AI and scientific workloads. This announcement highlights Super Micro’s role in supplying infrastructure for the Vera Rubin ecosystem, alongside NVIDIA and Dell. Super Micro Computer, trading at $35.46, is drawing fresh attention as it moves deeper into...
